agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Review accessibility, copy, and interaction patterns in dashboard UI paths in scope.

findings.title: Portfolio project card overlay buttons rely on title= only (export/remove)
findings.description: Re-audit: overlay actions show visible “Export” and “Remove” text with glyphs, descriptive aria-labels, and no reliance on title= alone.

proof_hooks.summary: Portfolio grid overlay buttons: inline-flex, visible Export/Remove spans, aria-label per project

history.notes: Re-audit (ux-20260410-030202): accessible names and visible labels present.

next_actions.action: Optional: align Activity nav copy with Job queue headline (f-23e02a8c) if product wants tighter terminology.
next_actions.rationale: Unrelated open debt; not blocking this closure.
